name: seo-llmeo
description: SEO and LLM Engine Optimization (LLMEO) — audits pages for traditional search-engine signals and LLM discoverability, generates meta tags, structured data, and llms.txt.

mode.description: Skill mode: audit (full SEO + LLMEO check), llms-txt (generate/update llms.txt), meta (generate meta tags), structured-data (generate JSON-LD)

target.description: URL or file path to audit/optimize

include_llmeo.description: Include LLMEO signals in audit (default: true)

include_cwv.description: Include Core Web Vitals guidance in audit (default: true)
